emails.subject: JP Morgan
emails.body: JP Morgan just rang me they want to meet with John Sherriff and Joe Gold????????????? What is going on????????????? They are going very deep into reserves too.

emails.subject: Re: JP Morgan
emails.body: Re: JP Morgan I believe they are interested in UK/EUROPE as a second step to Netco. What do you mean deep into reserves -------------------------- Sent By Mark Muller

emails.subject: RE: JP Morgan
emails.body: RE: JP Morgan You'll need to talk to Wes I think he is about to shut them down To: Kitchen, Louise
